docs.title: GTS ESM Knowledge Base
docs.text: Welcome to the GTS ESM team knowledge base. Use the tabs above to navigate.

docs.title: Sections
docs.text:
• Team — processes, tools, and onboarding guides
  • Reports — how to run and interpret our HTML reports
  • My Notes — personal reference and working notes

docs.title: Cases File
docs.text:
• Filename pattern: GTS ESM Cases_[MonthDay].xlsx
  • Sheet: SERVICE_CLOUD
  • Key fields: DISPLAYID, MONTH, CREATED_ON_DATE, STATUS, L1_CATEGORY, EXT_COURSECODE, PROCESSOR_ID, PROCESSOR_NAME, EXT_MISCINFO, SUBJECT

docs.title: Surveys File
docs.text:
• Filename pattern: GTS ESM Surveys_[MonthDay].xlsx
  • Sheet: Case List
  • Key fields: MONTH, RATING, L1_CATEGORY, COMMENT1, COMMENT2

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• CSAT = Top-2-Box (Very Satisfied + Somewhat Satisfied)
  • DE processors use PROCESSOR_ID = SAP_GERMANY_USER; resolve name from EXT_MISCINFO keyword
  • ILT cases detected via SUBJECT or EXT_MISCINFO containing "ILT"

docs.title: How to Run Reports
docs.text: Step-by-step guide to generating the GTS ESM HTML reports.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• Latest cases xlsx dropped in Downloads folder
  • Latest surveys xlsx dropped in Downloads folder

docs.title: Scripts
docs.text: Report Script Output Executive Summary Generate_Exec_Summary.ps1 GTS_Executive_Summary.html CSAT Bulletin Generate_CSAT_Bulletin.ps1 GTS_CSAT_Bulletin.html Daily Inflow Generate_Daily_Inflow.ps1 GTS_Daily_Inflow_June.html Agent Backlog Generate_Agent_Backlog.ps1 GTS_Agent_Backlog.html Coaching Log Generate_CoachingLog_HTML.ps1 GTS_CoachingLog.html Winners Circle Generate_Winners_Circle.ps1 GTS_Winners_Circle.html

docs.title: How to run
docs.text:
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "Generate_Exec_Summary.ps1"

All scripts are in C:\Users\I535893\Downloads\Claude and Me\

Outputs are saved to C:\Users\I535893\OneDrive - SAP SE\Projects\2026\Claude Scripts for Mie\
